title: Prof. Zhang Weiwei —Unite and Prosper NOT Divide and Ruin
description: Prof. Zhang Weiwei, professor of international relations at Fudan-University, China, speaking in Berlin at a conference of the Schiller Institute on July 12th, 2025, highlighted China's remarkable accomplishments in energy self-sufficiency, carbon reduction, and greening the desert. He criticized the geopolitical mindset in Europe that is preventing them from joining hands with China in creating the harmonious development of all nations.
